author: lOrm
content: Landed stall watchdog on BackgroundShellManager. Added last_data_time: Arc<AtomicU64> to BackgroundShell, refreshed on every stdout/stderr line by the reader threads (unix-secs via SystemTime). Added stall_check(timeout) returning Vec<(shell_id, command, idle_secs)> for every RUNNING shell whose idle time exceeds the threshold; finished shells excluded. Public free function stall_check_global() and constant DEFAULT_STALL_TIMEOUT_SECS = 120 re-exported via tools::. 4 tests pin: active shell not flagged at 60s threshold / silent shell flagged at 0s threshold / finished shell never flagged / DEFAULT constant convertible to Duration. Notification surfacing is the caller's choice — watchdog is a polling primitive.
